title: AI Workspace
description: The persistent workspace for prompts, notes, files, and multi-step AI reasoning.

title: Collaborative Sessions
description: Shared sessions for real-time collaboration on the same line of reasoning.

title: Knowledge Graph View
description: Visualize links between ideas, files, and prior sessions.

title: Citation Engine
description: Automatic source tracking with linked evidence for every claim.

title: File Ingestion
description: Upload PDFs, documents, and files to ground reasoning in your own material.

title: Note Editor
description: A focused editor for drafting, revising, and organizing notes inside the workspace.

title: Bring your own model
description: Connect your own model provider keys and switch without changing the workflow.

title: Web Search
description: Live, cited web search for current information and external grounding.

title: Flashcards with SRS
description: Generate spaced-repetition flashcards from notes and study material.

title: Mobile App
description: A native mobile experience for reviewing and continuing work on the go.

title: Native App
description: A dedicated native desktop and mobile app for a faster, more integrated experience.

title: API / Integrations
description: Connect Notion, Google Drive, and other external sources directly into Avenire.

title: RL Embedding Model
description: A retrieval model tuned on usage signals to improve relevance and ranking.

title: Link Ingestion
description: Import URLs and linked pages so external sources can become part of a workspace.

title: Student Knowledge Profile
description: Personalize retrieval using mastery signals so the system can boost what matters most.

title: Clip to Avenire
description: A browser extension for sending highlighted web content directly into Avenire.

title: Misconception Engine
description: Identify likely misunderstandings and surface corrections before they become sticky.

title: Visualization Tools
description: Graphs, charts, and diagramming tools for turning complex ideas into something visible.

title: Circle to AI (Halo)
description: A quick capture flow for circling content and turning it into an AI prompt or task.

title: Hybrid Search Improvements
description: Query rewriting and retrieval upgrades that make workspace search more accurate.

title: Task Management
description: Track work, follow-ups, and study tasks without leaving the workspace.
